purpose: Skill-side map for tool ownership and selection. This is documentation, not a dynamic router and not runtime permission.
runtime_permission_rule: Agents can directly call only tools exposed in their current runtime tool list. This index helps choose among available tools and decide when to delegate.

context_policy.keep_as_tools: Execution, validation, data retrieval, and structured failure-returning capabilities stay as tools.
context_policy.keep_as_skills: Workflow rules, method selection, examples, failure lessons, and tool-selection guidance stay in skills/references.
context_policy.do_not_do: Do not remove runtime tools just because a capability is documented here. Do not invent a function router for semantic decisions.

NTL_Engineer.use_when: SDGSAT-1 striping artifact removal is explicitly required.
SDGSAT-1 radiometric calibration is explicitly required.
VNP46A2 angular correction/preprocessing is explicitly required.
DMSP-OLS/EVI preprocessing is explicitly required.
Urban-area extraction by thresholding is requested and inputs are ready.
SVM-based urban extraction is requested and training/input requirements are met.
Electrification detection by NTL thresholding is requested.
Road extraction by Otsu/NTL method is explicitly requested.
Urban-center or spatial-structure detection is explicitly requested.
Trend analysis over prepared local NTL inputs is requested.
Anomaly detection over prepared local NTL imagery/time series is requested.
Local mean composite from existing NTL rasters is requested.
Existing local GeoTIFF and boundary files are present, scope is not national-scale, and local zonal statistics is appropriate.
The provincial indicator-estimation workflow applies.
The city DEI estimation workflow applies.
Official VJ/DNB full-chain processing is explicitly requested.
Official VJ/DNB preprocessing is explicitly requested.
VJ102/VJ103 precise product conversion to GeoTIFF is explicitly requested.
Official VJ/DNB GIF output is explicitly requested.
NTL-AIS fusion is explicitly requested.
SDGSAT-1 index computation is explicitly requested.
VNCI computation is explicitly requested.
Uploaded PDF context must be parsed.

Data_Searcher.use_when: Any GEE retrieval or GEE execution planning task.
Lightweight direct NTL raster download; failure state must be treated as terminal for that path.
Server-side GEE script/table export is preferred or required.
Dataset temporal coverage, bands, or metadata must be validated.
Recent GEE or LAADS/CMR data availability must be checked before execution.
China boundary artifacts are explicitly required.
Global boundary artifacts are explicitly required.
Geocoding, reverse geocoding, or POI retrieval is required.
Auxiliary NDVI or population raster data is required.
Socio-economic or external auxiliary data is required.
Official VJ/DNB products, GIF generation, or NTL-AIS fusion are explicitly required.

Code_Assistant.use_when: Run a saved Python script in the current thread workspace.
Validate code or diagnose the first execution failure.
Only after an Engineer draft is missing method details or fails for method reasons.

routing_rules.notes: Small-country GeoTIFF downloads are allowed. If export size fails or output_files is empty, treat as failed.

prohibited_primary_paths: bulk provincial shapefile download for local zonal statistics
routing_rules.notes: Use cloud-hosted NTL imagery and cloud-hosted administrative FeatureCollection with ee.Image.reduceRegions(); return/export CSV/table.
Allowed only when required raster/boundary files exist and the scope is suitable for local processing.

routing_rules.route: Engineer contract -> Data_Searcher as needed -> Code_Assistant
routing_rules.notes: Engineer owns ntl.script.contract.v1; Code_Assistant executes the saved draft first.
